title: poa longifolia subsp. meyeri
intro: Poa longifolia subsp. meyeri, also known as Meyer's bluegrass, is a subspecies of the Poa longifolia plant, which is a type of grass native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Meyer's bluegrass include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has also been used in traditional medicine to treat colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
